title: Home page loads hero banners, categories, regional highlights, and featured products
description: Verifies the landing page renders the core discovery sections successfully on initial load.

steps.description: Verify element "Hero banners section" is visible
Verify element "Featured products section" is visible
Verify element "Starter bundles section" is visible

title: Hero banners section is visible and shows multiple banners (if available)
description: Verifies the hero area renders banners in a way that indicates more than one banner can be displayed.

steps.description: Verify element "Hero banners section" is visible
Verify element "A hero banner image/card" is visible
Verify element "Banner pagination dots or indicator" is visible
Verify element "A hero banner image/card" is visible

title: Categories section renders a minimal set of categories on the landing page
description: Verifies categories are present on the home page to support quick discovery.

steps.description: Verify element "At least one category tile/chip" is visible
Verify element "At least one category tile/chip" is visible

title: Pilihan Daerah section renders regional highlights
description: Verifies the regional highlights section is visible and contains at least one item.

steps.description: Verify element "Pilihan Daerah list/carousel" is visible
Verify element "At least one regional highlight card" is visible
Verify element "At least one regional highlight card" is visible

title: Featured products section shows a list limited to 10 items (UI sanity)
description: Verifies featured products render as a bounded list intended for quick browsing.

steps.description: Verify element "Featured products section" is visible
Verify element "At least one featured product card" is visible
Verify element "Featured products list/grid" is visible
Verify element "Featured products section" is visible

title: Starter bundles section is visible and contains bundle items
description: Verifies starter bundles appear on the home page as an onboarding discovery aid.

steps.description: Verify element "Starter bundles section" is visible
Verify element "At least one starter bundle card" is visible
Verify element "At least one starter bundle card" is visible

title: Home page remains usable when banners fail to load (fallback content visible)
description: Verifies that a banner loading failure does not break the landing page and the rest of the sections remain visible.

steps.description: Verify element "Hero banners section" is visible
Verify element "Featured products section" is visible
Verify element "Starter bundles section" is visible

title: Landing page shows a loading state during initial content fetch
description: Verifies that the UI presents an in-progress state before content appears to prevent a blank screen experience.

steps.description: Verify element "Loading indicator or skeleton placeholders" is visible
Verify element "Hero banners section" is visible
Verify element "Featured products section" is visible

title: Browse products from Etalase and view product cards
description: Verifies the Etalase page shows a list of product cards with key visible information.

steps.description: Navigate to the Etalase (product browsing) page from the app entry point.
Verify element "A product card" is visible.
Verify element "Product image in a product card" is visible.
Verify element "Product price in a product card" is visible.
Verify element "Seller summary in a product card" is visible.

title: Filter products by a category (e.g., Beras)
description: Verifies category selection filters the product list and updates visible results.

steps.description: Navigate to the Etalase (product browsing) page from the app entry point.
Verify element "Filtered product list" is visible.
Verify element "A product card" is visible.
Verify element "Seller summary in a product card" is visible.

title: Search products by keyword and see results list
description: Verifies keyword search returns a visible results list on the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to the Etalase (product browsing) page from the app entry point.
Verify element "Search results list" is visible.
Verify element "A product card" is visible.

title: Search results show product card essentials (image, price, seller summary)
description: Verifies that items returned by search still render all essential product card fields.

steps.description: Navigate to the Etalase (product browsing) page from the app entry point.
Verify element "A product card" is visible.
Verify element "Product image in a product card" is visible.
Verify element "Product price in a product card" is visible.
Verify element "Seller summary in a product card" is visible.

title: Pagination or load-more shows additional products
description: Verifies that the user can move beyond the first page of products and see more results.

steps.description: Navigate to the Etalase (product browsing) page from the app entry point.
Scroll to the bottom of the product list.
Verify element "Load more button" is visible.
Verify element "Additional product cards" is visible.

title: Empty search shows a friendly no-results state
description: Verifies a keyword with no matches results in a visible no-results message and no crash.

steps.description: Navigate to the Etalase (product browsing) page from the app entry point.
Verify element "No results message" is visible.
Verify text "Try a different keyword" is visible.

title: Clear search returns to browsing results
description: Verifies the user can clear the current search and return to the default browsing list.

steps.description: Navigate to the Etalase (product browsing) page from the app entry point.
Verify element "Search results list" is visible.
Verify element "A product card" is visible.

title: View product detail page shows core product information
description: Verifies the product detail page renders photo(s), name, description, and price for an existing product.

steps.description: Navigate to a product detail page URL for a known existing product (static URL provided by the test environment).
Verify element "Order via WhatsApp" is visible.

title: Order via WhatsApp CTA opens WhatsApp with a pre-filled message
description: Verifies clicking the WhatsApp order CTA redirects to a wa.me URL containing a pre-filled text parameter.

steps.description: Navigate to a product detail page URL for a known existing product (static URL provided by the test environment).
Verify element "Order via WhatsApp" is visible.

title: Order via WhatsApp CTA is prominent and discoverable without scrolling
description: Verifies the WhatsApp order CTA is visible in the initial viewport on product detail.

steps.description: Navigate to a product detail page URL for a known existing product (static URL provided by the test environment).
Verify element "Order via WhatsApp" is visible.

title: Product not found UI appears for an invalid product URL
description: Verifies an invalid/non-existent product detail page shows a clear "Product not found" message.

steps.description: Navigate to a product detail page URL for a known non-existent product (static URL provided by the test environment).
Verify text "Product not found" is visible.
Verify element "Order via WhatsApp" is not visible.

title: Product detail page still loads when images fail to render
description: Verifies the page remains usable and key info is visible even if a product image cannot be displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to a product detail page URL for a product that is known to have a broken/missing image (static URL provided by the test environment).
Verify element "Order via WhatsApp" is visible.

title: Long product description is readable and does not hide the WhatsApp CTA
description: Verifies long descriptions can be viewed and the WhatsApp CTA remains accessible.

steps.description: Navigate to a product detail page URL for a product with a long description (static URL provided by the test environment).
Scroll to the bottom of the product detail page.
Verify element "Order via WhatsApp" is visible.

title: WhatsApp redirect includes seller phone number in the URL
description: Verifies the redirect URL includes the seller phone number (not just the message text).

steps.description: Navigate to a product detail page URL for a known existing product (static URL provided by the test environment).

title: Open a seller shop page and see seller info and product listings
description: Verifies a seller shop page shows seller identity details and a list of that seller’s products for focused browsing.

steps.description: Navigate to the Seller Shop Page using a valid seller shop URL provided by the test environment.
Verify element "Seller information section" is visible.
Verify element "Product listings section" is visible.
Verify at least one "Product card" is visible.

title: Seller shop page loads with zero products (empty state)
description: Verifies the shop page handles a seller with no products by showing an empty state message instead of a broken list.

steps.description: Navigate to the Seller Shop Page using a valid seller shop URL for a seller that has no products in the test environment.
Verify element "Product listings section" is visible.
Verify element "Product card" is not visible.

title: Non-existent seller shows 'Seller not found' message
description: Verifies an invalid seller shop page shows a clear not-found message for buyer guidance.

steps.description: Navigate to the Seller Shop Page using an invalid/non-existent seller shop URL provided by the test environment.
Verify text "Seller not found" is visible.

title: From 'Seller not found', return to home or search entry point
description: Verifies the not-found state provides a working path back to continue browsing.

steps.description: Navigate to the Seller Shop Page using an invalid/non-existent seller shop URL provided by the test environment.
Verify text "Seller not found" is visible.

title: Seller identity information remains visible while browsing product list
description: Verifies seller details stay present and visible so buyers maintain trust context while viewing items.

steps.description: Navigate to the Seller Shop Page using a valid seller shop URL provided by the test environment.
Scroll back to the top of the page.
Verify element "Seller information section" is visible.

title: Product listings show basic product information on cards
description: Verifies each product card shows recognizable basic info needed for browsing (name and price if applicable).

steps.description: Navigate to the Seller Shop Page using a valid seller shop URL provided by the test environment.
Verify element "Product name" is visible within a product card.
Verify element "Product price" is visible within a product card.
Verify element "Product image" is visible within a product card.

title: Refresh-like revisit: shop page still renders correctly on direct load
description: Verifies the shop page supports being opened directly (simulating a shared link) without missing content.

steps.description: Navigate to the Seller Shop Page using a valid seller shop URL provided by the test environment.
Verify element "Product listings section" is visible.
Verify at least one "Product card" is visible.

title: Add a product to the cart and see it in the cart list (happy path)
description: Verifies a user can add an item to the client-side cart and the cart shows the saved item.

steps.description: Click on the first visible product in the catalog list.
Verify an "Add to cart" button is visible.
Click on "Cart" (or cart icon/link) in the header or navigation.
Verify the selected product name is visible in the cart list.
Verify text "Quantity" is visible for the cart item.

title: Increase quantity for a cart item and verify it persists within the session
description: Verifies the cart quantity updates and remains correct after leaving and returning to the cart.

steps.description: Click on the first visible product in the catalog list.
Click on "Cart" (or cart icon/link) in the header or navigation.
Click on the "+" control (increase quantity) for the cart item.
Verify text "2" is visible as the quantity for the cart item.
Click on "Continue shopping" (or "Back" link within the app UI) to return to the catalog.
Click on "Cart" (or cart icon/link) in the header or navigation.
Verify text "2" is visible as the quantity for the cart item.

title: Add two different products and verify both appear in the cart list
description: Verifies multiple distinct items can be saved and retrieved into the cart list.

steps.description: Click on the first visible product in the catalog list.
Click on "Back" (or "Continue shopping") within the app UI to return to the catalog.
Click on a second, different visible product in the catalog list.
Click on "Cart" (or cart icon/link) in the header or navigation.
Verify at least two cart items are visible in the cart list.

title: Remove an item from the cart and verify it no longer appears
description: Verifies a user can remove a saved item from the client-side cart list.

steps.description: Click on the first visible product in the catalog list.
Click on "Cart" (or cart icon/link) in the header or navigation.
Verify the selected product name is visible in the cart list.
Click on "Remove" (or trash/delete icon) for the cart item.
Verify the selected product name is not visible in the cart list.

title: Add a product to wishlist and verify it appears in wishlist view
description: Verifies a buyer can add a product to the wishlist and sees it reflected in the wishlist UI (client-side storage-backed).

steps.description: Scroll to a visible product card in the product listing.
Click on the wishlist control for that product (for example, a heart icon or 'Save' button).
Verify text "Added to wishlist" is visible.
Click on "Wishlist" in the main navigation (header or menu).
Verify the previously wishlisted product is visible in the wishlist list.

title: Remove a product from wishlist and verify it no longer appears
description: Verifies a buyer can remove an item from the wishlist and the UI updates accordingly.

steps.description: Scroll to a visible product card in the product listing.
Click on the wishlist control for that product (for example, a heart icon or 'Save' button).
Click on "Wishlist" in the main navigation (header or menu).
Verify the previously wishlisted product is visible in the wishlist list.
Click on the remove-from-wishlist control for that product (for example, filled heart toggle or "Remove").
Verify text "Wishlist is empty" is visible.

title: View e-learning modules list (happy path)
description: Verifies the user can open the e-learning area and see a list of educational modules.

steps.description: Navigate to the E-Learning page from the application entry point (use the primary navigation or menu link labeled "E-Learning" or "Learning").
Verify at least one module card/list item is visible.
Verify each visible module entry shows a module title.

title: Open a module detail from the modules list
description: Verifies selecting a module from the list opens its detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to the E-Learning page from the application entry point (use the primary navigation or menu link labeled "E-Learning" or "Learning").
Verify at least one module card/list item is visible.
Click on the first visible module card/list item.
Verify a module detail heading (module title) is visible.
Verify a module content section (such as "Overview", "Description", or the lesson content) is visible.
Verify a "Back" control or breadcrumb to return to the modules list is visible.

title: Return to modules list from a module detail
description: Verifies the user can navigate back from a module detail view to the module list.

steps.description: Navigate to the E-Learning page from the application entry point (use the primary navigation or menu link labeled "E-Learning" or "Learning").
Click on the first visible module card/list item.
Verify a module detail heading (module title) is visible.
Click on "Back" (or the breadcrumb/link that returns to the modules list).
Verify at least one module card/list item is visible.

title: Modules list shows loading state while fetching
description: Verifies a visible loading indicator or placeholder appears while modules are being retrieved.

steps.description: Navigate to the E-Learning page from the application entry point (use the primary navigation or menu link labeled "E-Learning" or "Learning").
Verify a loading indicator is visible (such as "Loading", a spinner, or skeleton placeholders).
Wait for the modules list to finish loading.
Verify at least one module card/list item is visible.

title: Module detail shows loading state while fetching detail
description: Verifies a visible loading indicator or placeholder appears while module detail is being retrieved.

steps.description: Navigate to the E-Learning page from the application entry point (use the primary navigation or menu link labeled "E-Learning" or "Learning").
Verify at least one module card/list item is visible.
Click on the first visible module card/list item.
Verify a loading indicator is visible on the detail view (such as "Loading", a spinner, or skeleton placeholders).
Wait for the module detail content to finish loading.
Verify a module detail heading (module title) is visible.

title: Render analytics dashboard with valid session
description: Verifies the admin analytics dashboard loads and displays key metric sections when the session is valid.

steps.description: Verify text "Top clicked products" is visible
Verify text "Most viewed products" is visible

title: Dashboard shows top search keywords section
description: Verifies the dashboard includes a visible section for top search keywords after loading.

steps.description: Verify text "Top search keywords" is visible
Verify element "Top search keywords" section is visible

title: Dashboard shows top-performing sellers section
description: Verifies the dashboard includes a visible section for top-performing sellers after loading.

steps.description: Verify element "Top-performing sellers" section is visible

title: Dashboard loads without visible error message
description: Verifies that after a successful login, the analytics dashboard does not show an obvious error state to the admin.

steps.description: Verify text "Something went wrong" is not visible

title: Dashboard displays lists with at least one visible entry (when data exists)
description: Verifies that metric sections render visible list/table content rather than staying blank when analytics data is available.

steps.description: Verify element "Top clicked products" section is visible
Verify element "Most viewed products" section is visible
Verify at least one visible row/item is present under "Top clicked products" or "Most viewed products"

title: Create a new seller profile and confirm it appears in the seller list
description: Verifies an admin can create a seller profile and see it listed afterward.

steps.description: Click on "Shops" or "Sellers" in the admin navigation

title: Create seller profile with valid fields and verify success confirmation
description: Verifies the create-seller form accepts valid inputs and shows a visible success state.

steps.description: Click on "Shops" or "Sellers" in the admin navigation
Type "Green Valley Store" into the shop name field
Type "+2348012345678" into the WhatsApp number field

title: Finish creating seller profile and verify it is visible in the list
description: Verifies saving a seller profile returns to the list and the new seller is visible.

steps.description: Click on "Shops" or "Sellers" in the admin navigation
Type "Green Valley Store" into the shop name field

title: Validation: attempt to create seller with missing required fields shows messages
description: Verifies required-field validation prevents saving and shows visible validation messages.

steps.description: Click on "Shops" or "Sellers" in the admin navigation

title: Validation: missing WhatsApp number shows specific error and blocks save
description: Verifies creating a seller without a WhatsApp number shows a visible field error and does not create the seller.

steps.description: Click on "Shops" or "Sellers" in the admin navigation
Type "No WhatsApp Shop" into the shop name field

title: List view: seller list loads and displays at least one row with expected columns
description: Verifies the seller listing screen renders and shows key seller fields in the UI.

steps.description: Click on "Shops" or "Sellers" in the admin navigation

title: Create a product without an image and verify it saves successfully
description: Verifies an admin can create a product record without uploading an image (if supported) and it appears in the list.
category: Admin Product Management (CRUD + Image Upload & Cropping)

steps.description: Click on "Products" in the admin navigation
Type "Test Product No Image" into the "Product name" field
Select "Category" option "Grains" from the category dropdown
Verify text "Test Product No Image" is visible

title: Validate required fields when creating a product (missing name)
description: Verifies the UI prevents saving when required fields are missing and shows a visible validation message.
category: Admin Product Management (CRUD + Image Upload & Cropping)

steps.description: Click on "Products" in the admin navigation
Select "Category" option "Dairy" from the category dropdown
Verify text "Name is required" is visible
Verify text "Product created" is not visible

title: Verify products list renders and supports basic search/filter (if present)
description: Verifies the products list loads and any available search/filter controls update visible results.
category: Admin Product Management (CRUD + Image Upload & Cropping)

steps.description: Click on "Products" in the admin navigation

title: Create a new marketing banner/promotion and see it in the list
description: Verifies an admin can add a new marketing item and it appears in the marketing list UI.

steps.description: Click on "Marketing" in the admin navigation

title: Create banner with valid inputs and verify success confirmation
description: Verifies the create form accepts valid title, image URL, and link and shows a visible success state.

steps.description: Click on "Marketing" in the admin navigation
Verify text "Create" or "New Marketing" is visible

title: Create banner: required fields validation (empty submit)
description: Verifies the create form shows visible validation errors when submitting with missing required fields.

steps.description: Click on "Marketing" in the admin navigation

title: Create banner: invalid image_url shows validation error
description: Verifies the UI displays a validation error when the image URL is invalid.

steps.description: Click on "Marketing" in the admin navigation
Type "Summer Sale" into the Title field

title: Create banner: invalid image_url error remains visible after submit attempt
description: Verifies the admin cannot save with an invalid image URL and an error message is visible after submission.

steps.description: Click on "Marketing" in the admin navigation
Type "not-a-url" into the Image URL field

title: Cancel banner creation returns to marketing list without adding
description: Verifies canceling out of the create form returns to the list view and does not show a new item created in that session.

steps.description: Click on "Marketing" in the admin navigation

title: Admin can open Trending Management page
description: Verifies the trending management screen loads and shows expected page content.

title: Trending list displays items after initial load
description: Verifies the page loads and displays a visible list of trending items (or an explicit empty state).

steps.description: Verify element "Trending items list" is visible

title: Reorder trending items and save successfully
description: Verifies an admin can change ordering of trending items and persist the update via Save.

steps.description: Verify element "Trending items list" is visible
Click on "Move down" for the first trending item
Verify element "Trending items list" is visible

title: Save without changes does not break and shows stable state
description: Verifies clicking Save with no ordering changes completes without visible errors.

title: Cancel/Discard changes restores the original ordering
description: Verifies a user can discard ordering edits and see the original list ordering restored.

steps.description: Verify element "Trending items list" is visible
Click on "Move up" for the second trending item
Verify element "Trending items list" is visible
